description: Returns a cargo container of a unit's vest.
examples:
<sqf>
hint str getMagazineCargo vestContainer player;
/*
	returns e.g
	[
		[
			"30Rnd_65x39_caseless_mag",
			"16Rnd_9x21_Mag",
			"HandGrenade",
			"APERSMine_Range_Mag",
			"SmokeShell",
			"SmokeShellGreen",
			"Chemlight_green"
		],[
			2,
			2,
			2,
			3,
			1,
			1,
			2
		]
	]
*/
</sqf>
name: vestContainer

ret.desc: cargo container or [[objNull]] if ''unit'' does not wear a vest
